conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid prepared according to Visual Resources Collection local practices.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday October 5, 2018 at 23:11
Converted for better (but not full) compliance with Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines with vrc-migrate.xsl (mr2007-03-28).
Architecture: Ancient. converted from EAD 1.0 to 2002 by v1to02.xsl (sy2003-10-15).
Transformed with yale.addEadidUrl.xsl. Adds @url with handle for finding aid. Overwrites @url if already present.

did.abstract: Collection consists of black and white and color reproductions of ancient architecture. Content varies from original photographic prints to reproductions from magazines and other published sources. Some sections have accompanying clippings folders.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University. Further use of this material may be subject to the copyright laws of the United States (Title 17, United States Code), or to site license or other rights management terms or conditions.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Ancient Architecture Collection, Arts Library, Yale University.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: These materials are stored offsite at the Library Shelving Facility. For access to the materials, please make a request at the Art & Architecture Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged alphabetically by region or nationality. Sub-divided by site and building type or name.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection consists of black and white and color reproductions of ancient architecture. Content varies from original photographic prints to reproductions from magazines and other published sources. Some sections have accompanying clippings folders.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a folder of miscellaneous clippings.
